title: Cavernous-X-Patched
description: A port of Cavernous making use of Patched to make it work with other mods such as Terralith.
body:
# **NEEDS MODS TO WORK CORRECTLY, [PATCHED](https://modrinth.com/mod/patched) IS REQUIRED.** 

There’s instructions on how to do it manually included but not recommended unless you know what you’re doing. If doing the manual way it appears that you need to put this pack before terralith to work correctly. I am also not updating the manual method as it's too messy for me to work with or suggest so do so at your own risk.

## **Install Instructions** 

A version of Cavernous is embedded inside so just grab the datapack and the mod patched and you should be good to go. 


If not using a mod/datapack that is adding custom biomes with an overworld.json(such as [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)) you'll probably need the Fix to make the biomes work correctly. 
**_Noteable packs that will need this fix is if you're only using [Geoliphic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), or [WWOO](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo) WITHOUT [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)._**


## **Description**
Simply a port of Thxlotl's [Cavernous](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cavernous) to convert it to make use of EnderTurret's [Patched](https://modrinth.com/mod/patched) to work with other mods.

Tested with [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)(2.5.9), [Tectonic/Terratonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)(3.0.0), and [WWOO](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo)(2.44).

Technically compatible with 1.20.1(for version 1.5, no higher)just some of the items might not work right but the generation side should be fine. 

## **Credits**
Massive credit to Thxlotl for the amazing work on they did on Cavernous and to EnderTurret for making this possible and helping me create the patches correctly. Also credit to SlideDrum for figuring out how to fix the overwriting of Terralith biomes. I was just the middle man to put everything together and post it.

The discord linked is Thxlotl’s and has a channel for #compatibility if you have questions.


### Final Notes 
I disabled geysers in my version as I wasn't a huge fan of them though feel free to enable them yourself as they're still in the pack just diabled by default. I also disabled the intro message because I find them to be annoying but the same stuff I think is still true about needing command blocks enabled for some stuff to work.
